mapper.sql: A.SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID AS srchwrdManageId, A.SRCHWRD_MANAGE_NM AS srchwrdManageNm, A.SRCHWRD_CONECT_URL AS srchwrdManageUrl, A.USER_SEARCH_AT AS srchwrdManageUseYn, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.SRCHWRD_MANAGE_NM LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD_MANAGE A WHERE A.SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID = #{srchwrdManageId}
SELECT SRCHWRD_ID AS srchwrdId, SRCHWRD_NM AS srchwrdNm, SRCHWRD_CO AS srchwrdCnt FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD WHERE SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID = #{srchwrdManageId} ORDER BY SRCHWRD_CO DESC
SELECT SRCHWRD_ID AS srchwrdId, SRCHWRD_NM AS srchwrdNm, SRCHWRD_CO AS srchwrdCnt FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD WHERE SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID = #{srchwrdManageId} AND SRCHWRD_NM = #{srchwrdNm}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD WHERE SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID = #{srchwrdManageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD (SRCHWRD_ID, SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID, SRCHWRD_NM, SRCHWRD_CO, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID) VALUES (#{srchwrdId}, #{srchwrdManageId}, #{srchwrdNm}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{frstRegisterId})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RECENT_SRCHWRD SET SRCHWRD_CO = SRCHWRD_CO + 1 WHERE SRCHWRD_MANAGE_ID = #{srchwrdManageId} AND SRCHWRD_NM = #{srchwrdNm}
